data.title: Vitalik commented on Binance Square: Limited attention, unclear about the content quality, but looking forward to improvements in the interactivity and operability of decentralized communities.
data.description: In response to a community member's question about "how to view exchange social products like Binance Square," Vitalik stated at the Firefly-organized Chinese-language decentralized social discussion Space that he had previously paid limited attention and was unaware of the specific quality of the content. In his view, it's fine for exchanges to create social products, but it's clearly unreasonable for companies and platforms worldwide to do so. He hopes that similar platforms will develop their own unique features or niche themes in the future. He added that if a high-quality decentralized social platform exists, he would be happy to integrate his blog content and use it. He hopes that in the future, different companies and platforms can connect to an interoperable decentralized social system to communicate and connect with people worldwide.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Wallets' Role in Decentralized Social Networks
data.description: Vitalik Buterin has underscored the significance of wallets in decentralized social networks, focusing on privacy and user interface accessibility. According to NS3.AI, Buterin observed that numerous users of decentralized social applications equipped with integrated wallets have not fully interacted with the Ethereum ecosystem. He supports the option for users to switch between various wallet applications to maintain their rights to self-custody and control over their private keys.

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens Observed
data.description: A substantial movement of TON tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 15:52, 1,386,800 TON tokens were transferred from Kiln to an anonymous address beginning with Uf9UjA9S. Subsequently, this address moved the same amount of TON tokens to another destination.

data.title: Arthur Hayes received 5.83 million ATH tokens, worth $52,200, from the Aethir vesting contract.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes (@cryptoHayes) (0xA86e...506F) received 5.83 million ATH tokens, worth $52,200, from the Aethir attribution contract.

data.title: Analysts: The sudden jump in the yen may just be a "test" and a "warning" from the Japanese authorities.
data.description: Justin Low, an analyst at the financial website Investinglive, stated that the yen had previously experienced a sharp jump. This price fluctuation shares similarities with the Japanese Ministry of Finance's "currency test," resembling situations seen in 2024 and 2022. The last "currency test" occurred in mid-July 2024, just before Japanese authorities intervened to buy yen; the one before that was on September 14, 2022, a week before actual intervention. The purpose of a "currency test" is to give the market some warning time before actual intervention. Therefore, we already have a general expectation of the yen's movement; the only question is when the intervention will take place. The analyst stated that, in his personal opinion, this does not appear to be a true intervention, as any substantial action by Japan would have a broader and stronger impact. Therefore, this is merely a "currency test," and we should see some official statements regarding it in the next few hours. (Jinshi)

data.title: OKX will list SPACE spot trading.
data.description: OKX will launch spot trading for SPACE (Spacecoin). Spot trading will open on January 23, 2026 at 20:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: A trader spent $46,600 on Polymarket betting that Russia and Ukraine would not cease hostilities before the end of 2026.
data.description: According to Lookonchain's monitoring, trader itscherry (0x1c37...18de) joined Polymarket back in July 2024 but had never traded before. Today, this user suddenly spent $46,600 betting that "Russia and Ukraine will not cease hostilities by the end of 2026".

data.title: Merkle Manufactory to Refund $180 Million in Venture Funding Amid Farcaster Ownership Change
data.description: Merkle Manufactory has announced its decision to return $180 million in venture funding as Farcaster transitions to new ownership. According to NS3.AI, Farcaster has been acquired by Neynar, which plans to shift the platform's focus from a social-first model to prioritizing infrastructure and developer adoption. Despite the change in ownership, Farcaster continues to operate with approximately 250,000 monthly active users and over 100,000 funded wallets. The founding team is stepping back as Neynar takes over the platform's operations.

data.title: Pundi AI Announces Partnership with Okratech: Building a Native AI-on-Chain Economy
data.description: Pundi AI has announced a partnership with Okratech to combine its decentralized freelance ecosystem, OrtJob, with its decentralized data infrastructure, turning human tasks and contributions into a verifiable data layer for AI. Okratech builds an on-chain digital work economy through OrtJob and its Web3 app store, eliminating intermediaries and connecting creators and freelancers directly to create decentralized, borderless work opportunities. Through this collaboration, human labor such as tagging and verification within the Okratech ecosystem will be structured into on-chain data for AI learning and application. Pundi AI's data platform and marketplace will transform these tasks into verifiable datasets, rewarding participants and providing developers with access to high-quality, transparent data. Simultaneously, Okratech's Web3 app store will distribute Pundi AI's dataset tokens, making AI data as easily accessible as applications. Together, the two companies are driving an open, fair, and human-centric AI future, connecting human labor with decentralized AI infrastructure.

data.title: Analysts say the gold bull market is driven by "non-speculative" funds, and gold prices may rise significantly further.
data.description: Analyst Jeremy Boulton stated that gold's astonishing rally continues, hitting a record high of $4,967 per ounce on Friday. Long positions in gold surpassed 300,000 contracts in January 2025, but currently stand at only around 200,000 contracts. Despite a price increase of over $2,000 per ounce since January 2025, it has failed to attract a large number of buyers. Due to the lack of large-scale long positions to restrain this, gold prices may rise significantly further. Current buyers are clearly not speculators, and their positions are likely more stable than speculative positions. The weakening of the US dollar during the gold rally suggests that demand may stem from adjustments to the composition of foreign exchange reserves by various countries. (Jinshi)

data.title: Japanese Officials Likely Intervene in Forex Market Amid Yen Weakness
data.description: The recent decision by the Bank of Japan regarding interest rates has led to a weakening of the yen. According to Odaily, analyst Giuseppe Dellamotta from Investinglive suggests that Japanese officials have likely intervened in the foreign exchange market. It appears that they have set a floor for the USD/JPY exchange rate at 159.00. Last week, there was an increase in verbal interventions by officials, which helped alleviate pressure on the yen.

data.title: Survey Highlights Concerns Over Data Accuracy in Crypto Projects
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the well-known cryptocurrency project information platform, RootData, has revealed significant insights into the perceptions of exchange professionals. According to ChainCatcher, the survey targeted individuals working in exchange listing departments, with approximately 41% of respondents falling into this category. The findings indicate a common belief among these professionals that incomplete or outdated information on public data platforms can negatively impact a project's rating and raise doubts about its operational capabilities.

data.title: Gate's total ETH staking volume has surpassed 167,200, with an annualized yield of 9.70%.
data.description: According to the latest data from the Gate platform, the total amount staked for its ETH mining (staking) product has reached 167,200 ETH, with a reference annualized yield of 9.70%. Users can earn an equivalent amount of GTETH by staking ETH, achieving asset appreciation. This service supports instant redemption, releasing liquidity and obtaining stable returns. In addition to ETH, the platform also offers multi-currency staking options. As of press time, the reference annualized yields are: GUSD 3.50%, BTC 10%, SOL 16%, and USDT 3.92%.

data.title: CZ: Retail investors should pay attention to position control when participating in trading, and can start by using a small amount of capital to try it out.
data.description: CZ, speaking at the World Economic Forum in Davos yesterday, stated that retail investors need a learning curve when participating in cryptocurrency trading, and risk management is also crucial. He advised against investing all of one's hard-earned money in trading, suggesting starting with a small portion. "When anyone encounters something new, don't jump in all at once. If you can't swim, falling into a deep pond won't be pleasant."

data.title: Analysts: Japan suspected of intervening in the yen exchange rate
data.description: Giuseppe Dellamotta, an analyst at the financial website Investinglive, stated that after the Bank of Japan's interest rate decision led to a weaker yen, it appears that Japanese officials did intervene in the foreign exchange market. It seems that Japanese officials have set a floor for the USD/JPY exchange rate at 159.00. Last week, we also saw increased verbal intervention from officials, which helped alleviate pressure on the yen. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Alpha will list SPACECOIN (SPACE), with an airdrop threshold of 227 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance Alpha will list SPACECOIN (SPACE), with Alpha trading officially commencing on January 23, 2026 at 10:00 AM UTC. Users with at least 227 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 6,720 SPACE tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours; otherwise, they will be considered to have forfeited their claim.

data.title: A trader went long on 2.96 million ASTER tokens with 5x leverage, worth $1.86 million.
